main.description: Published by a bidder in its own repo to announce availability. The bidder periodically updates `updatedAt` to signal liveness. The market registry polls this record to decide whether the bidder is still active.

endpointUrl.description: Service DID ref (e.g. did:web:HOST#pdr_temp_market) where submitRfp calls should be routed.

appliesTo.description: Payload NSIDs this bidder handles (e.g. com.publicdomainrelay.temp.compute.vm).

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last liveness update. The bidder updates this periodically; the registry treats a record as stale when updatedAt is older than a configured threshold (default 5 minutes).
